logger.doc:name: start Logger
logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "started logger for fetching case", payload: #[payload]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload as Array map(covidCase, indexOfCovidCase)->{ caseId: covidCase.case_id, source: covidCase.source, case_type: covidCase.case_type, first_name: covidCase.first_name, last_name: covidCase.last_name, phone: covidCase.phone, email: covidCase.email, date_of_birth: covidCase.date_of_birth as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, national_id: covidCase.national_id, national_id_type: covidCase.national_id_type, address:{ street_address: covidCase.street_address, city: covidCase.city, state: covidCase.state, postal: covidCase.postal, country: covidCase.country, }, update_date: covidCase.update_date as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd" }, create_date: covidCase.create_date as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, create_by: covidCase.create_by, update_by: covidCase.update_by }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "code":404, "message":"resource not found", "description":"no mathing records with give id "++ vars.nationalID as String, "dateTime":now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'z'"}, "transactionId":vars.transactionId }

logger.doc:name: Logger ended
logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "ended logger for fetching case", payload: #[payload]
